g.text: Kevin Kelly is not known for one big thing, and that is the point of the work.
He is as intelligent, hard-working, and patient as history's iconic makers.
Instead, in his words, he works Hollywood style in a series of projects.
Kelly was an editor of the Whole Earth Catalog in the early 1980s.
He helped start WELL, one of the first online communities in 1985.
He co-founded WIRED magazine in 1993 and wrote a dozen books.
He rides a bike across the U.S. and draws deep analogies from movement.
This mode hides surrounding chrome and surfaces only meaningful actions.

svg.text: Add highlight • Ask question • Save note
Option C Immersive mode: sidebars collapse while reading, floating actions appear on selection/scroll.
